TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Kelenna_Azubuike, title = Kelenna_Azubuike, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kelenna_Azubuike} }

S.FORM: Kelenna Azubuike sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1983, ryax sa tay 16 nqu tay 12, Kelenna Azubuike, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Kelenna Azubuike sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1983, ryax sa tay 16 nqu tay 12, Kelenna Azubuike, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: kelenna azuβuike s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, kelenna azuβuike, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
